title: Iceberg 16x
description: Clean Looks, Cleaner Combos. Iceberg 16x adds lots pvp and bedwars functionality while preserving the vanilla art style.
body:
![Iceberg 16x Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d5c663af7e855cd41c52208a9fd2e32cb83f1ef.png)

# Overview
_Iceberg 16x_ is a lightweight pvp texture pack for 1.20+, it is meant to give gameplay a clean, polished feel while still staying true to the base game.

### Features
Wool outlines
Diagonal Swords
Cleaner UI
MCC Island style hearts
Smoother armor textures
Bedwars item textures
Tool Textures

### Planned Features
No crystal particals
Totem textures
Better Shields
Updated HUD textures
Better Sky

**Note**_, on some versions the pack may show as broken or incompatible, this is a bug, the pack works on any version after 1.16.4 (excluding snapshots), if the pack actually breaks, please report it on the github page._

_This pack is in development, expect unfinished features._
